title: Same Color for Groups, status, etc
excerpt:
There are times where I do not want different colors for elements on my boards, e.g. Groups, Status, etc. 
I would like the ability to use the same color for multiple items.

posts.author: ShawnBaden (shawn baden)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are times where I do not want different colors for elements on my boards, e.g. Groups, Status, etc.

I would like the ability to use the same color for multiple items.

posts.author: mattcave (Matthew Cave)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. Sometimes we have multiple scenarios that could be considered “done” that don’t require a different color. We use as many similar shades of green as we can, but it makes our board look like a rainbow. It would be nice to have several different labels for one color so we can see at a glance what is needs attention and what doesn’t.

posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
